title: Implement inline script detection
description: Implement InlineDetector with lazy parser init, inlineRules table (bash/sh/zsh -c, eval, python -c, ruby -e, perl -e/-E, node -e/--eval, lua -e), flag-based body extraction, eval handling, heredoc detection from AST, pipeline-aware heredoc, recursive bash parsing with MaxInlineDepth=3, WarnInlineDepthExceeded. Wire into extractor. Unit tests for all inline rules, heredoc, recursion depth, negative cases.
